Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Dialga G. Dialga G LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Drapion LV.X
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon. That Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 3 damage counters instead of 1 on that Pokémon between turns. This power can't be used if Drapion is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. ) The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Drapion. Drapion LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Giratina LV.X
Ability-Effect: Whenever your opponent's Pokémon tries to attack, your opponent discards 1 card from his or her hand. (If your opponent can't discard 1 card, your opponent's Pokémon can't attack. ) You can't use more than 1 Invisible Tentacles Poké-Body each turn.
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. ) If any of your opponent's Pokémon would be Knocked Out by damage from this attack, put that Pokémon and all cards attached to it in the Lost Zone instead of discarding it.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Giratina. Giratina LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Palkia G LV.X
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Any player who has 4 or more Benched Pokémon chooses 3 of his or her Benched Pokémon. Put the other Benched Pokémon and all cards attached to them in the Lost Zone. (You choose your Pokémon first. ) This power can't be used it Palkia G is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Discard 2 Energy attached to Palkia G. Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Palkia G. Palkia G LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Shaymin LV.X
Ability-Effect: Each of your [G] Pokémon (excluding any Shaymin) gets +40 HP. You can't use more than 1 Thankfulness Poké-Body each turn.
Effects: Choose as many [G] Energy cards from your hand as you like and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. If you do, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each [G] Energy attached in this way.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Shaymin. Shaymin LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Shaymin LV.X
Ability-Effect: If any of your [G] Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, each of Shaymin's attacks does 60 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Effects: You may move any number of Energy cards attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Shaymin. Shaymin LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Electabuzz
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage plus Electabuzz does 10 damage to itself.

Name: Scyther
Effects: During your next turn, Scyther's Slash attack's base damage is 60 instead of 30.

Name: Lotad
Ability-Effect: If Lotad has any [W] Energy attached to it, Lotad's Retreat Cost is 0.
Effects: Remove 1 damage counter from Lotad.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

Name: Swablu
Effects: Remove 4 damage counters from Swablu. Swablu can't retreat during your next turn.
If Swablu was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does the same amount of damage done to Swablu to the Defending Pokémon.
Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

Name: Vulpix
Effects: Search your deck for up to 2 [R] Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them in your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched [G] Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Discard a [R] Energy card from your hand. (If you can't discard a card from your hand, this attack does nothing. )
